business_ideas.idea: Camp MFM: in-person event combining conference + basketball with celebrity guests instead of speakers
Creator content strategy: obsessive focus on one medium/platform for 5-7 years like Mr. Beast on YouTube
Paying people to teach you things outside expertise areas to expand creative knowledge base

predictions.text: Joy and spectacle-focused content will scale better than divisive/outrage-based content long-term
Stand-up comedy could work on YouTube with original Mr. Beast-style twist if obsessed for 5-7 years
Following obsession for 5-7 years produces better outcomes than hedging between multiple paths
